title: Light: Reflection and Refraction - Complete Mastery Test

questions.text: The radius of curvature of a spherical mirror is 20 cm. What is its focal length?
Which of the following lenses would you prefer to use while reading small letters found in a dictionary?
options: A convex lens of focal length 50 cm
A concave lens of focal length 50 cm
A convex lens of focal length 5 cm
A concave lens of focal length 5 cm

questions.text: No matter how far you stand from a mirror, your image appears erect. The mirror is likely to be:
